case_title: HIRSCH BEDNER ASSOCIATES VS. PINE STREET INVESTORS LLC et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HIRSCH BEDNER ASSOCIATES SERVED AUG-05-2004, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BRENNEKE, PAUL
